1.message: Happy birthday was only two words. This moment was everything else I wanted to say.

Y.message: Nothing special happened that day. We just went out to eat. But this picture reminds me that even the ordinary days become my favorites when I'm with you.

sugarplum.message: No plans. No destination that mattered. Just one random night, at the parking lot, and you. Somehow, those are always the best ones.

ANIII.message: Five years. We grew up, made mistakes, learned, stayed... and somehow I still look at you the same way I did when we started..

SAZ25.message: I thought we'd just enjoy a vacation. I never expected one random night over a few drinks with your siblings would become one of my favorite memories. It made me realize how lucky I am to be part of moments like these.
